mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BILL_INPUT bi LEFT JOIN BILL_OUTPUT bo ON bi.TXBL_SRN = bo.TXBL_SRN AND bi.BASE_YM = bo.BASE_YM AND bi.TXBL_SRN = bo.TXBL_SRN WHERE bi.BRCD is not null

SELECT
FROM BILL_INPUT bi LEFT JOIN BILL_OUTPUT bo ON bi.TXBL_SRN = bo.TXBL_SRN AND bi.BASE_YM = bo.BASE_YM AND bi.TXBL_SRN = bo.TXBL_SRN WHERE bi.BRCD is not null
ORDER BY bi.NO
ASC
DESC
mapper.sql: bi.ISS_SRN, bi.BRCD, bi.HDQR_BOB_DCD, bi.TXBL_DCD, bi.SPLR_BSNN_NO, bi.SPLR_FRM, bi.SPLR_BZST_NM, bi.SPLR_ITMS_NM, bi.ISS_AMT, bi.TXBL_LSAR_NM, bi.RCV_YMD, bi.JOB_YMD, bi.JOB_YN, bi.FRRG_TS, bi.FRRG_EMN, bi.LSMD_TS, bi.LSMD_EMN, bi.NO, bo.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_PRB_CON , bo.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_PRB_CON , bo.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON , bo.RSRE_YMD
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM BILL_INPUT bi LEFT JOIN BILL_OUTPUT bo ON bi.ISS_SRN = bo.ISS_SRN AND bi.BRCD = bo.BRCD WHERE bi.ISS_SRN = #{issSrn} AND bi.BRCD = #{brcd}

SELECT
FROM BILL_INPUT bi LEFT JOIN BILL_OUTPUT bo ON bi.TXBL_SRN = bo.TXBL_SRN AND bi.BASE_YM = bo.BASE_YM AND bi.TXBL_SRN = bo.TXBL_SRN WHERE bi.BRCD is not null
ORDER BY bi.NO
ASC
DESC

SELECT bi.ISS_SRN , bi.BRCD FROM BILL_INPUT bi LEFT JOIN BILL_OUTPUT bo ON bi.ISS_SRN = bo.ISS_SRN AND bi.BRCD = bo.BRCD WHERE bi.BRCD is not null
and bi.NO < #{no}
and bi.NO > #{no}
ORDER BY biNO
ASC
DESC
limit 1
